lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਨਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਸੀਲਵੰਤੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਰੂਪੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: daanaa daataa seelavant niramal roop apaar |
lines.english: God is Wise, Giving, Tender-hearted, Pure, Beautiful and Infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਪਰੀਤਿ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਸੁਖੀ ਨ ਦੀਸੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa moh pareet dhrig sukhee na deesai koe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Cursed is emotional attachment and love of Maya; no one is seen to be at peace. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਖਾ ਸਹਾਈ ਅਤਿ ਵਡਾ ਊਚਾ ਵਡਾ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sakhaa sahaaee at vaddaa aoochaa vaddaa apaar |
lines.english: He is our Companion and Helper, Supremely Great, Lofty and Utterly Infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਲਕੁ ਬਿਰਧਿ ਨ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਦਰਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: baalak biradh na jaaneeai nihachal tis daravaar |
lines.english: He is not known as young or old; His Court is Steady and Stable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਪੇਖਤ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਹਿਰਹਿ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸਾਂਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: jis pekhat kilavikh hireh man tan hovai saant |
lines.english: Seeing Him, our evil inclinations vanish; mind and body become peaceful and tranquil.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਸੋਈ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਿਧਾਰਾ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jo mangeeai soee paaeeai nidhaaraa aadhaar |2|
lines.english: Whatever we seek from Him, we receive. He is the Support of the unsupported. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਨਵਤਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਪੂਰਨ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਦਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: gun nidhaan navatan sadaa pooran jaa kee daat |
lines.english: He is the Treasure of Excellence, the Ever-fresh Being. His Gift is Perfect and Complete.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਏਕੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਮਨ ਕੀ ਲਾਹਿ ਭਰਾਂਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: eik man ek dhiaaeeai man kee laeh bharaant |
lines.english: With one-pointed mind, meditate on the One Lord, and the doubts of your mind will be dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਕਾ ਸਖਾ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau poorab likhiaa tin kaa sakhaa govind |
lines.english: One whose destiny is so pre-ordained, obtains the Lord of the Universe as his Companion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਆਰਾਧੀਐ ਦਿਨੁ ਵਿਸਰਹੁ ਨਹੀ ਰਾਤਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa aaraadheeai din visarahu nahee raat |3|
lines.english: Forever and ever, worship and adore Him. Day and night, do not forget Him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਅਰਪੀ ਸਭੋ ਸਗਲ ਵਾਰੀਐ ਇਹ ਜਿੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: tan man dhan arapee sabho sagal vaareeai ih jind |
lines.english: I dedicate my body, mind, wealth and all to Him. I totally sacrifice my soul to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖੈ ਸੁਣੈ ਹਦੂਰਿ ਸਦ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਰਵਿੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: dekhai sunai hadoor sad ghatt ghatt braham ravind |
lines.english: Seeing and hearing, He is always close at hand. In each and every heart, God is pervading.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਿਰਤਘਣਾ ਨੋ ਪਾਲਦਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦ ਬਖਸਿੰਦੁ ॥੪॥੧੩॥੮੩॥
lines.translit: akirataghanaa no paaladaa prabh naanak sad bakhasind |4|13|83|
lines.english: Even the ungrateful ones are cherished by God. O Nanak, He is forever the Forgiver. ||4||13||83||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਦੀਆ ਰਖਿਆ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਵਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: man tan dhan jin prabh deea rakhiaa sehaj savaar |
lines.english: This mind, body and wealth were given by God, who naturally adorns us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਕਲਾ ਕਰਿ ਥਾਪਿਆ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਅਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sarab kalaa kar thaapiaa antar jot apaar |
lines.english: He has blessed us with all our energy, and infused His Infinite Light deep within us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਿਮਰੀਐ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਰਖੁ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa prabh simareeai antar rakh ur dhaar |1|
lines.english: Forever and ever, meditate in remembrance on God; keep Him enshrined in your heart. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਸਦਾ ਰਹੁ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਵਿਆਪੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: prabh saranaaee sadaa rahu dookh na viaapai koe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Remain in God's Sanctuary forever, and no suffering shall afflict you. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere man har bin avar na koe |
lines.english: O my mind, without the Lord, there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਨ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਮਾਣਕਾ ਸੁਇਨਾ ਰੁਪਾ ਖਾਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: ratan padaarath maanakaa sueinaa rupaa khaak |
lines.english: Jewels, treasures, pearls, gold and silver-all these are just dust.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਸੁਤ ਬੰਧਪਾ ਕੂੜੇ ਸਭੇ ਸਾਕ ॥
lines.translit: maat pitaa sut bandhapaa koorre sabhe saak |
lines.english: Mother, father, children and relatives-all relations are false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਜਾਣੈ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: antar baahar rav rahiaa tis no jaanai door |
lines.english: The Lord is pervading within and beyond, and yet people think that He is far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਤਾ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਣਈ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਪਸੁ ਨਾਪਾਕ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jin keetaa tiseh na jaanee manamukh pas naapaak |2|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is an insulting beast; he does not acknowledge the One who created him. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤੀ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਹੂਣਿਆ ਆਵਹਿ ਵੰਞਹਿ ਪੂਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bhagatee naam vihooniaa aaveh vanyeh poor |3|
lines.english: Without devotion to the Naam, crowds of people come and go. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਲਾਗੀ ਰਚਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਕੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: trisanaa laagee rach rahiaa antar haumai koor |
lines.english: They are engrossed in clinging desires; within their hearts there is ego and falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਰਖਨਹਾਰੁ ਮਹਾ ਬਿਕਟ ਜਮ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bin prabh koe na rakhanahaar mahaa bikatt jam bheaa |
lines.english: Without God, there is no saving grace. The Messenger of Death is cruel and unfeeling.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਖਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਕਰਣਹਾਰ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਕਰਿ ਦਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: raakh lehu prabh karanahaar jeea jant kar deaa |
lines.english: Please preserve Your beings and creatures, God; O Creator Lord, please be merciful!

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰਉ ਕਰਿ ਅਪੁਨੀ ਹਰਿ ਮਇਆ ॥੪॥੧੪॥੮੪॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na veesrau kar apunee har meaa |4|14|84|
lines.english: O Nanak, may I never forget the Naam! Please bless me with Your Mercy, Lord! ||4||14||84||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਤ ਦਾਰਾ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਅਨੇਕ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਰੰਗ ਅਰੁ ਵੇਸ ॥
lines.translit: sut daaraa banitaa anek bahut rang ar ves |
lines.english: You may have children, a wife and many mistresses; you may enjoy all sorts of pleasures and fine clothes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਤਨੁ ਅਰੁ ਧਨੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਰਾਜ ਰੂਪ ਮੈ ਦੇਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: meraa tan ar dhan meraa raaj roop mai des |
lines.english: "My body and my wealth; my ruling power, my beautiful form and country-mine!"

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere man har har naam dhiaae |
lines.english: O my mind, meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਨ ਵਸਈ ਕਾਰਜਿ ਕਿਤੈ ਨ ਲੇਖਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har naam ridai na vasee kaaraj kitai na lekh |1|
lines.english: And yet, if the Name of the Lord does not abide within the heart, none of it has any use or value. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਭਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan dhiaaeeai masatak hovai bhaag |
lines.english: Those who have such blessed destiny written on their foreheads meditate on the Treasure of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਨਿਤ ਸਾਧ ਕੀ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar sangat nit saadh kee gur charanee chit laae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Always keep the Company of the Holy, and focus your consciousness on the Feet of the Guru. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਕਟੀਐ ਨਾ ਆਵੈ ਨਾ ਜਾਗੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: haumai rog bhram katteeai naa aavai naa jaag |2|
lines.english: The diseases of ego and doubt are cast out; they shall not come and go in reincarnation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਰਜ ਸਭਿ ਸਵਾਰੀਅਹਿ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaaraj sabh savaareeeh gur kee charanee laag |
lines.english: All their affairs are brought to fruition, holding onto the Guru's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਹਰੇ ਸਾਚਾ ਏਹੁ ਸੁਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo praan man tan hare saachaa ehu suaau |
lines.english: Your soul, breath of life, mind and body shall blossom forth in lush profusion; this is the true purpose of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਤੂ ਸਾਧ ਕੀ ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar sangat too saadh kee atthasatth teerath naau |
lines.english: Let the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, be your cleansing baths at the sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage.
